description:
Parkitect is a modern take on classic theme park tycoon games where you build and manage the theme parks of your dreams!
Construct your own coasters, design efficiently operating parks that fully immerse your guests in their theming and play through the campaign.

0.0.1.description:
Installation can be found [here](https://github.com/CrusherRL/AP_Parkitect?tab=readme-ov-file#-installation)

In case you do not like to have a debug log, download the Archipelago.dll and replace it.
Enjoy!
0.0.1.title: Version 0.0.1

0.1.0.description:
Yay next release and the mod seems pretty stable to far!
Installation [here](https://github.com/CrusherRL/AP_Parkitect?tab=readme-ov-file#-installation)

This version is not compatible with the [0.0.1](https://github.com/CrusherRL/AP_Parkitect/releases/tag/0.0.1) version.
The save data needs to be refactored. Migration can be made manually, just write me on the Archipelago Discord [here](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1417531615956963439)!

In case you do not like to have a debug log, download the Archipelago.dll and replace it.
Enjoy!

# Parkitect Archipelago — Release Notes

## New Features
- **Added Skips:** Players now always start with **5 skips**.  
- **New Parks:** Added **The Broken Atoll** and **Magma Falls** ([link to description]).  
- **Input Field for Commands:** You can now directly enter **Archipelago commands** in-game.  

## Improvements
- **Shop Ingredient Trap:** Now correctly sets stock to **0** when triggered.  
- **Trap Text:** Updated to be **more accurate and clear**.  
- **Archipelago Options Text:** Improved wording for better readability.  
- **Archipelago Window:** General UI and usability improvements.  
- **Debugger:** Window is now **minimized by default** and includes **better logging**.  
- **Unity Archipelago Window:** Reduced the amount of clutter and warnings in the `player.log` file.  

## Stability & Fixes
- **File Sharing Violation Fix:** The mod should now **start reliably** without throwing startup errors.  
- **General Stability:** Further tweaks to make the mod **more robust and stable**.
0.1.0.title: Version 0.1.0

Added 1 new Thrill ride and 2 new Coaster due to the Dinos & Dynasties DLC
0.1.1r2.title: Version 0.1.1

0.1.2.description:
Improved some QOL stuff. The mod only is active (i mean actually doing stuff) if the right park is loaded!

Installation can be found [here](https://github.com/CrusherRL/AP_Parkitect?tab=readme-ov-file#-installation)

In case you do not like to have a debug log, download the Archipelago.dll and replace it.
Enjoy!

# Parkitect Archipelago — Release Notes
## Fixes
- Fixed an issue where the AP Config file was not being created.
- Fixed a bug that caused the mod to remove stalls and rides even when the park was not the correct one.

## Improvements
- Added macOS and Linux support:
  - The configuration window is now fully usable on both platforms.
  - Added documentation and setup instructions for macOS.
0.1.2.title: Version 0.1.2

0.1.3.title: Version 0.1.3

1.0.0.description:
First stable Release! after a full test i can say, it never crashed! And almost everything worked rightaway :D

Installation can be found [here](https://github.com/CrusherRL/AP_Parkitect?tab=readme-ov-file#-installation)

In case you do not like to have a debug log, download the Archipelago.dll and replace it.
Enjoy!

# Parkitect Archipelago — Release Notes
## Balance Changes
- Reduced shop profit from **5000** to **3000**
- Added low-profit rides that generate reduced revenue

## Improvements
- Added correct labels to DLC choices
- Fixed maximum Items exceeding **60%**

## Bug Fixes
- Fixed challenge check where in-game rating over 100
- Fixed saving data for stalls and attractions
- Fixed issue where only last speed-up button was enabled on loading the Park


# Edit - 29.12.2025 23:59:15
For some reason the version displayed the wrong one, even thou the code is correct. i just reuploaded :)
1.0.0.title: Version 1.0.0

1.1.0.description:
Installation can be found [here](https://github.com/CrusherRL/AP_Parkitect?tab=readme-ov-file#-installation)

In case you do not like to have a debug log, download the Archipelago.dll and replace it.
Enjoy!

# NOTE:
This release is not backwards compatible with seeds generated on 1.0.0

# Parkitect Archipelago — Release Notes
## Improvements
Savegame data is now tied to the seed rather than the individual park. This means you can now play multiple Archipelago challenges using the same park/scenario, with each challenge keeping its own progress.

# Parkitect Archipelago — Release Notes
## Features
- Added a Bunch of Parkitect Mods to support. You can checkout the Collection from the Readme.
- Added a Versionchecker to prevent using old world with newer Mod
- DebuggerWindow: Added helper to log all Attractions and Shops
